subject: Fix unable to set tosca function on complex type on input operation

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

Im seeing the following in testing when setting an integer sub property to an entry from a list of inputs:
:
      interfaces:
        Nslcm:
          heal:
            implementation: jkhjk
            inputs:
              addedVfcComplex:
                prefixlen:
                  get_input:
                  - addedListIntInput
                  - - 0
note the two dashes before the index '0'. There should only be a single dash, i.e. 
      interfaces:
        Nslcm:
          heal:
            implementation: jkhjk
            inputs:
              addedVfcComplex:
                prefixlen:
                  get_input:
                  - addedListIntInput
                  - 0
